description: §6.2 Shape 4 refinement-SATISFYING-empty negative: `<y>: number(>=0)` — the base canonical empty 0 SATISFIES `>=0`, so it is used as the default and E-REFINEMENT-NO-DEFAULT does NOT fire. The predicate-satisfies counterpart to shape4-refinement-no-default.
rationale: §6.2 Shape 4: if the base canonical empty SATISFIES the refinement predicate (number(>=0) → 0), it is used and no diagnostic fires.
